title: Competitive Positioning
summary: Metro, technology, and M&A competitive angles—use battle cards alongside discovery questions from the portfolio modules.

sections.heading: Battle cards (PDFs in training folder)
sections.body: Keep positioning tight: customer problem, GPC fit, proof points, and landmines. Confirm dates on each PDF with marketing before external use.
